sys_update_version.name: x_680259_scm_widget_configuration_716af527c361321057b3d4fc05013187
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_680259_scm_widget_configuration"><x_680259_scm_widget_configuration action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><description/><number>WDT-CONFIG0001001</number><script><![CDATA[(function executeConfig() {
    const transactionId = gs.generateGUID();
    const logger = new Logger({
        transactionId: transactionId,
        source: "WDT-CONFIG0001001.js",
        includeTimeStamp: true,
        includeUserInfo: true,
        includeSessionId: true,
    });

    try {
        const widgetHelper = new ContactList({
            transactionId: transactionId,
        });
        return widgetHelper.getTableConfigObject();
    } catch (error) {
        logger.error(
            "Error getting table configuration object: " + error.message,
        );
        throw error;
    }
})();
]]></script><short_description>Contact main list configuration object</short_description><sys_class_name>x_680259_scm_widget_configuration</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-12-07 12:29:22</sys_created_on><sys_id>716af527c361321057b3d4fc05013187</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name/><sys_package display_value="SCM" source="x_680259_scm">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SCM">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_680259_scm_widget_configuration_716af527c361321057b3d4fc05013187</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-20 12:21:52</sys_updated_on></x_680259_scm_widget_configuration></record_update>
